title: Drop-Down Keybindings
description: Allows you to collapse all keybinds in a category by clicking on a category entry
body:
## Overview

We often encounter too many keybindings.

And to make it easier to find them, this mod adds a feature that allows you to collapse all keybinds in a category by clicking on a category entry.

Since the mod has not been extensively tested, please report any bugs.

If there is anything that could be improved, suggestions are also welcome!

## Mods that have been manually compatible

- Controlling
